resources.string: Unlock additional features and become patron to support continued development!
Bluetooth Volume Manager no get ads and no dey sell user data. Continued development na only possible because of you.
Become patron and sponsor development! Tap di button below to activate all extra features and open my GitHub Sponsors profile.

- Motivated developer
- Unlimited devices
- Extra actions
and more...
Di alternative na ads, analytics and Google Play
Thank you for supporting open-source development
You don come back? Your support dey keep BVM alive!
